economic_notes: Thirteen reportable segments including Arena, Band Housing, CMHC Housing, Deer Cable, Educational Services, Economic Development, First Nations Management, Health Services, Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership, Operating Programs, Public Works, Social Services, and Capital. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership revenue relates to a gaming revenue settlement with Province of Ontario.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit signed May 25, 2022 — over a year delay. Large deferred revenue balance of $15.58M (up from $3.04M) driven primarily by $6.47M CMHC Construction and various capital/infrastructure deferrals. CMHC housing construction of $6.47M deferred represents a significant non-recurring capital contribution. Revenue deferred to subsequent year net of prior year deferrals results in a net deferral of $12.54M impacting reported revenues significantly. expenses_housing combines Band Housing ($1,258,416) and CMHC Housing ($413,925). No remuneration schedule found in extracted text. No population or employee counts disclosed.
warnings: High ISC dependency (90.89%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
